conclusion: Output-path audit does not improve c2 aggregate scaling. Default batch-GEMV outputs remain green and fastest among tested variants. Native full-attention O output alone is green but slower; native linear output alone is correctness-red at prefixes [82,137]; all-native linear/full output is generated-token green [137,137] but slower than default and below serial bridge. No default promotion or retained throughput claim.

both_batch.decision_reason: profiler_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; scaling.ratios.aggregate_vs_c1 must be > 1.0 for retained performance claim; scaling.ratios.aggregate_vs_serial_bridge must be > 1.0 for retained performance claim; profiler trace was not captured with expected kernels present; profiler.artifact_path must be under benchmarks/results; profiler.source_artifact_path must be a non-empty string; profiler.output_format must be csv; profiler.trace_dir must be a non-empty string; profiler.trace_files must be a non-empty string list; profiler.synthesized_fields must be a string list; profiler.status must be captured; profiler.expected_kernels_present must be true; profiler.trace_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.expected_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.kernel_durations_ns must be a non-empty object; profiler kernel names must include selected projection_dispatch candidate or variant; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns has no observations; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns observation count must cover graph_bucket_stats.hits

batch_blockers: native c>N decode currently supports compact physical-slot-ordered rows; full-attention batch context is native only for BF16 KV and context < 1024
native c>N decode is experimental and blocked until generated-token equality passes
linear_batch.decision_reason: batch_execution.throughput_claim_eligible=false; generated-token equality vs independent c=1 did not pass; correctness.generated_token_equality.passed must be true; correctness.generated_token_equality.batch_sequences must equal c1_sequences; correctness.generated_token_equality.mismatches must be empty; profiler_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; scaling.ratios.aggregate_vs_c1 must be > 1.0 for retained performance claim; scaling.ratios.aggregate_vs_serial_bridge must be > 1.0 for retained performance claim; profiler trace was not captured with expected kernels present; profiler.artifact_path must be under benchmarks/results; profiler.source_artifact_path must be a non-empty string; profiler.output_format must be csv; profiler.trace_dir must be a non-empty string; profiler.trace_files must be a non-empty string list; profiler.synthesized_fields must be a string list; profiler.status must be captured; profiler.expected_kernels_present must be true; profiler.trace_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.expected_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.kernel_durations_ns must be a non-empty object; execution.batch_execution.blockers must be empty; profiler kernel names must include selected projection_dispatch candidate or variant; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns has no observations; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns observation count must cover graph_bucket_stats.hits
